## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm type-check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No environment variables exposed in client code (only `NEXT_PUBLIC_*`)
- [ ] No `console.log` left in code
